# Azure Blob Storage (AZ-204)

This section covers Azure Blob Storage fundamentals, lifecycle management, and development using the .NET SDK.

---

## 📚 Modules

### 1. Explore Azure Blob Storage

* Core concepts and resource structure
* Blob types and storage accounts
* Security (RBAC, SAS, encryption)

👉 `10_explore-blob-storage/`

---

### 2. Manage Blob Storage Lifecycle

* Hot, Cool, Archive tiers
* Lifecycle management policies
* Rehydration process

👉 `20_blob-lifecycle/`

---

### 3. Work with Blob Storage

* .NET SDK usage
* Upload / Download blobs
* Metadata and properties
* REST API basics

👉 `30_work-with-blob-storage/`

---

## 🧠 Summary (Exam Focus)

👉 `blob-storage-summary.md`
